scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp -R index.html robots.txt sitemap.xml dist/ && [ -d public ] && cp -R public dist/public || true && for d in live-seafood-singapore live-crabs-singapore roe-crab-singapore live-lobster-singapore manila-clams-singapore soon-hock-singapore alaskan-king-crab-singapore reviews-media; do [ -d "$d" ] && cp -R "$d" dist/ || true; done
